subcodes.title: Words to Mr Maxwell and others, spoken on 1912-09-06
subcodes.first_line: You must cling to those things which prove to be the cause of happiness for the world of man. You must show kindness to the orphans
subcodes.first_line_orig: شماها باید بآنچه سبب آسایش عالم انسانی است تشبث نمائید یتیمها را نوازش کنید گرسنه ها را سیر نمائید
subcodes.subjects: @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
